title: CNN analysis: Trump might not have a good way out of the Iran war — political unpopularity, midterm pressure
snippet: CNN analysis: Trump faces growing political pressure over Iran war with no easy exit. War is politically unpopular for Republicans ahead of midterms. GOP hawks criticize deal as too favorable to Iran. Public fatigue growing at Day 90.
tag_reason: CNN의 트럼프 정치적 딜레마 분석은 이전 보고서에 없는 신규 분석.
